# BANHALMI — Deutsch service site

Official domain: https://www.banhalmi.at
Primary entity: https://www.banhalmi.art/norbert-banhalmi
Primary entity page: https://www.banhalmi.art/norbert-banhalmi?lang=de
Brand: BANHALMI — since 1999
Current Austrian business founded: 2023-11-27
Business name: Norbert Banhalmi – Executive Porträt und Bildstrategie
GISA-Zahl: 36592951
UID / VAT: ATU80445314
GLN: 9110037983878
Contact email: hello@norbertbanhalmi.com
Primary phone for this domain: +43 677 616 55592
Primary studio: Studio Wien
Secondary studio: Studio Budapest

What this site is about:
This is the professional service layer of BANHALMI. It presents executive portraiture, brand and brand photography and visual direction, corporate event photography, and fine art / artistic photography services between Vienna and Budapest.

Primary knowledge hub:
https://www.banhalmi.art/?lang=de

Best of gallery:
https://www.banhalmi.art/?lang=de#gallery

Books:
https://www.banhalmi.art/konyveim?lang=de

Exhibitions:
https://www.banhalmi.art/fotokiallitasok?lang=de

Journal / knowledge base:
https://www.banhalmi.art/blog?lang=de

Core service concepts:
- Presence: executive portraiture and human trust before the first conversation.
- Identity: brand and brand photography and visual direction for people, founders, organizations and public-facing work.
- Moments: corporate and cultural event photography with discretion and narrative attention.
- Perspective: fine art, artistic portraiture and private commissions informed by long-term photographic research.

## SEO / GEO / AI focus — Production v3
Primary name: Norbert Banhalmi / Bánhalmi Norbert
Brand: BANHALMI
Core services: executive portrait photography, brand photography, brand photography and visual direction, C-level event photography, fine art portrait photography.
Geography: Vienna, Budapest, Central Europe, Austria, Hungary.
Editorial principle: the work is about trust, presence, dignity and human attention; photography is the medium, not the whole message.
Primary entity: https://www.banhalmi.art/norbert-banhalmi


## Professional Creative Network
BANHALMI wird von einem professionellen kreativen Netzwerk aus nahezu fünfzig Fotografen, Retuscheuren und visuellen Spezialisten unterstützt. Speier Viko kann ausgewählte AmCham-bezogene Projekte je nach Projektanforderung koordinieren. Norbert Banhalmi ist OM SYSTEM Botschafter und arbeitet mit OM SYSTEM Botschaftern sowie mit dem professionellen Fotografenteam von VIPACH – Vienna Photo Art & Creative Hub zusammen. Dieses Netzwerk ermöglicht hochwertige Leistungen in den Bereichen Executive-Porträt, Markenfotografie, Bildstrategie, C-Level-Eventfotografie und künstlerische Aufträge in Wien, Budapest und international.


Professional Network Benefit
Members of an American Chamber of Commerce may receive 50% additional professionally retouched images at no extra cost. Coordination depends on project requirements and may involve Norbert Banhalmi, a dedicated BANHALMI coordinator, or Speier Viko for selected AmCham-related international business projects.


Project coordination and AmCham benefit
BANHALMI projects may be coordinated personally by Norbert Banhalmi, by a dedicated BANHALMI project coordinator, or for selected AmCham/international business projects with Speier Viko involved according to the requirements. For eligible AmCham-related projects, an additional retouching benefit may be confirmed in the written offer.

Redaktionelle Stimme: Ich spreche in der ersten Person. Ich beginne mit Aufmerksamkeit, nicht mit der Kamera. Die Arbeit handelt von Würde, Präsenz und Vertrauen, bevor sie Fotografie wird.
